import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import styled from 'styled-components' import './App.css' import GlobalStyle from './GlobalStyles' import LandingPage from './components/LandingPage' import ContactForm from './components/ContactForm' import Footer from './components/Footer' import Typewriter from 'typewriter-effect'; const App = () => { const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true) useEffect(() => { setTimeout(() => { setIsLoading(false) }, 1500) }, [setIsLoading]) return isLoading ?
{ typewriter .changeDelay(80) .typeString("Initializing") .callFunction(state => state.elements.cursor.style.display = "none") .changeDelay(300) .changeDeleteSpeed(300) .typeString(".") .typeString(".") .typeString(".") .deleteChars(1) .deleteChars(1) .deleteChars(1) .start() }} />
: (
XD
); } const AppContainer = styled.div`` export default App;
